title: DFA: CV search-finalize (ladder-beam + base-var groups)
summary: Ladder-beam variable selection scored by pooled test log-likelihood across pre-split folds. Columns sharing a prefix before `_._` are treated as at-most-one.

title: DFA: CV search-finalize without base-var groups
summary: Opt out of the `_._` at-most-one rule (useful when column names don't follow the convention).
oce_text:
[["model-dfa::cv-search-finalize"]]
folds_dir = "./folds"
run_dir = "./runs"
run_name = "pilot_cv_search_flat"
y_col = "y"
use_exclusion_groups = false
